seo.title: Diana | Chicago UGC Creator
seo.description: Chicago-based UGC creator specializing in beauty, lifestyle, travel, and product storytelling.

hero.title: Diana
hero.description: I create beauty, lifestyle, and travel content that feels natural, thoughtful, and genuinely worth watching.
hero.location: Based in Chicago, IL · Available worldwide

about.title: Content that feels genuinely human.
about.text: My content blends clean visuals with a natural point of view. I focus on creating work that feels polished enough for a brand, but personal enough for people to trust.

values.title: Authentic storytelling
values.text: Natural, relatable content that builds trust instead of feeling like advertising.

values.title: Multi-platform ready
values.text: Optimized for TikTok, Instagram, YouTube Shorts, Amazon, and paid ads.

values.title: Bilingual content
values.text: Content created in English and Russian for different audiences and markets.

values.title: Reliable partnership
values.text: Fast communication, organized workflow, attention to detail, and on-time delivery.

statement.text: Real moments. Thoughtful visuals. Content your audience can trust.

videoSection.title: UGC video
videoSection.description: Short-form concepts for Reels, TikTok, organic social, and paid campaigns across beauty, lifestyle, and travel.

photoSection.title: UGC photography
photoSection.description: Lifestyle imagery for social media, websites, email campaigns, and product pages.

services.title: UGC Videos
services.text: Authentic short-form videos for TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, and paid ads.

services.title: UGC Photos
services.text: Lifestyle and studio-style product photography for websites, social media, and marketing campaigns.

services.title: Voiceover & Tutorials
services.text: Natural voiceover, demos, routines, reviews, and how-to content.

services.title: Script & Concept Creation
services.text: Creative concepts, hooks, and storylines tailored to your brand and audience.

services.title: Editing & Variations
services.text: Professionally edited content with optional hook, CTA, and format variations for testing.

services.title: Monthly Packages
services.text: Consistent monthly UGC for brands looking to build long-term relationships and maintain a fresh content library.

steps.title: Brief
steps.text: You share your goals, brand style, target audience, and content ideas.

steps.title: Strategy
steps.text: Together we define the creative direction, deliverables, timeline, and usage rights.

steps.title: Create
steps.text: I film, edit, and refine your content while keeping your brand identity front and center.

steps.title: Deliver
steps.text: You receive polished, ready-to-post content with revisions included if needed.

campaignSection.title: Tailored to your brand.
campaignSection.description: Every collaboration is customized to fit your brand, campaign goals, and content needs. Pricing is based on deliverables, usage, and project scope.
campaignSection.rateText: Paid usage, whitelisting, and exclusivity are quoted separately.

contactSection.title: Let's turn your product into someone's next favorite.
contactSection.description: Based in Chicago, IL · Available for collaborations worldwide.
